title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates
description: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Learners cumulatively produce a tested tool-loop state machine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
